actions.title: Escape 5 raw unescaped & chars in public/sitemap-images.xml that made the whole image sitemap malformed XML
actions.why: public/sitemap-images.xml (referenced by sitemap-index.xml) had 5 bare & chars in image titles/captions (LA & OC, Downey & Surrounding Cities, LA & Orange County, Reviews & Client Stories, Videos & Reels). xmllint failed with xmlParseEntityRef: no name => the ENTIRE image sitemap was unparseable, so Google discarded it and every image entry was invisible for Google Images. Escaped all 5 -> &. QC: xmllint now well-formed (was BAD), all 4 site XML valid, diff 5+/5- one file ampersands-only. Whitelisted 'sitemap updates' => pushed. Surfaced by the v15 latent-defect sweep re-arm (2nd real ship it has produced, after run170's future-lastmod fix).

actions.title: Remove 53 em/en dashes from image titles/captions in public/sitemap-images.xml (human-voice rule; captions can surface in Google Images)
actions.why: Surfaced by the run178 latent sweep alongside C14. sitemap-images.xml has 53 em/en dashes (e.g. 'Jesse Oñate — bilingual realtor…', 'Realtor — Downey & Surrounding Cities'). The hard human-voice rule bans em/en dashes in customer-facing copy, and image-sitemap captions/titles can surface in Google Images results. Deferred from run178 to keep that run to one small whitelisted step (rewriting 53 copy strings is a copy edit, not a structural QC/sitemap fix). NOT auto-shippable as-is: rewriting each dash into natural punctuation is a copy-voice judgment; a future run can do it as a scoped human-voice pass (grep QC gate) OR draft for Jesse. Verify the same dashes don't also live in the corresponding page <title>/OG tags before rewriting.

actions.title: Correct 5 future-dated <lastmod> values in public/sitemap.xml on live /insights/ posts
actions.why: public/sitemap.xml had 5 lastmod dates in the FUTURE (2026-08-06/09-03/09-10/10-01/10-15) vs today 2026-07-20 — themed-month dating on future-slug /insights/ blog posts. Google treats future lastmod as unreliable and can discard lastmod for the ENTIRE sitemap (Mueller), a self-inflicted crawl-priority loss adjacent to no-black-hat faux-freshness. Fixed all 5 -> 2026-07-02 (real git last-commit date of each file). QC: xmllint OK, 0 future dates remain, 151 locs unchanged. Surfaced by the v14.9 latent-defect sweep; the anchor==clean fast-path could not detect it (defect was in already-committed content).

actions.title: Strip fabricated aggregateRating (5.0/100) from 105 files
actions.why: FTC fake-review + Google manual-action liability; zero star upside since 2019.

actions.title: Open robots.txt to AI search crawlers
actions.why: AI Overview / Perplexity / Copilot visibility. Does not affect classic rank.

actions.title: Optimize the (claimed-but-basic) GBP to 100%: primary category 'Real Estate Agent', visible Downey-area address + service areas, Latino-owned/bilingual attributes, jessetek.net URL, 20+ geotagged photos
actions.why: Map pack is GBP-fed (~32% weight) and is the #1 winnable surface. 2026-06-11 (Claude, in-browser): added secondary category 'Real estate consultant'; confirmed Latino-owned attribute set, keyword-led description present, primary category correct, opening date Dec 2020. REMAINING (Jesse only): 20+ geotagged photos, Services list, weekly Google Posts, keep growing reviews past 20.

actions.title: Sprint to 10 real Google reviews in 30-45 days (text recent closed clients the GBP review link)
actions.why: Reviews = #2 factor, currently ZERO. Crossing 9->10 gives a visible pack bump.

actions.title: Build Jtek (GHL) 'Closed/Funded' 4-touch SMS+email review-request workflow + bilingual templates (compliant: no gating/incentives/naming)
actions.why: Sustains 4+ fresh reviews/month. Claude builds workflow+copy; Jesse wires trigger & sends. Ties into existing rate-SMS automation.

actions.title: Fix visible '100+ verified reviews' / '5.0 Google rating' text on ~50 pages to match REAL review data
actions.shipped: 2026-06-11 commit 77ad604 — live GBP shows 20 reviews @ 5.0; corrected '100+ verified reviews' -> '20+ Google reviews' on 50 files; '100+ closings' (defensible) left intact
actions.why: Site claimed 100+ reviews but GBP has 20 — false-advertising exposure now removed.

actions.title: Kill doorway duplication: rebuild 4-6 core city pages (Downey, Montebello, Norwalk, Pico Rivera, Whittier) at 1,000-3,000 unique words; 301 distant clones into a Service-Areas hub
actions.why: ~97% identical 476-word city clones = the templated-doorway pattern Google suppresses; likely the structural cause of the 169-impression ceiling. Needs Jesse's real local facts/anecdotes. REINFORCED by 2026-07-13 research: the March-2026 Core Update explicitly rewards hyper-local unique content (neighborhood refs, local events, city-specific copy) and penalizes generic/templated national content via 'entity-based local authority' — this is now the HIGHEST-value on-page fix, not just hygiene.

actions.title: Add a real first-person E-E-A-T author block (photo, name, DRE #02133131, bilingual-native, years/closings) to every money page + Person schema
actions.why: YMYL pages currently show no human author. Cheapest credibility lift. Needs Jesse's bio facts (years active, closings #).

actions.title: Build the Spanish lane: 'Agente Bilingue' page + authentic Spanish neighborhood guides ('agente de bienes raices Downey', 'casas en venta Montebello')
actions.why: Clearest white-space win — portals barely compete in Spanish; demographics ideal. Authentic Spanish only (Jesse validates).

actions.title: Ship one cleanly-targeted 'Downey Real Estate Agent' page (title city-first, single H1, exact phrase in slug/first 100 words, FAQ)
actions.shipped: 2026-06-11 commit 06f7423 — /real-estate-agent-downey: deep+unique, front-loaded E-E-A-T, FAQPage+RealEstateAgent+Breadcrumb schema (no aggregateRating), wired into sitemap + neighborhoods/downey internal link
actions.why: Directly targets the stated head term in its winnable qualified form; don't cannibalize the bilingual page.

actions.title: Add front-loaded 134-167-word Q&A blocks (answer + a concrete stat first) to core city pages for AI Overview citations; wrap in FAQPage
actions.why: 44.2% of AI citations come from the first 30% of text; a stat lifts odds ~40%. Jesse validates local numbers. SHARPENED 2026-07-13: with 43% of local packs now rendering an AI Overview, FAQPage schema is the concrete eligibility play — BUT the JSON-LD must MIRROR visible on-page Q&A (schema aligned to visible featured-snippet content boosts AI-Overview eligibility; markup that exceeds visible copy does not). Never ship FAQPage without the matching visible Q&A block.

actions.title: Expand sameAs to VERIFIED profiles only; areaServed -> City+ZIP (90240/90241/90242); fix phantom breadcrumbs; build hub->city->neighborhood internal links
actions.why: Consolidates the Jesse Onate entity for Google + AI; routes crawl to deep pages. Needs list of which profiles actually exist. NOTE (run59, 2026-07-14): the 'fix phantom breadcrumbs' sub-concern is VERIFIED CLEAN — site-wide BreadcrumbList scan = 373/373 items resolve to a real file, 0 phantom links. Remaining C7 scope (sameAs verification, areaServed City+ZIP, hub->city internal links) still gates on Jesse's verified-profile list.

actions.title: Lock ONE canonical NAP vs LIVE GBP, then claim Zillow/Realtor.com/Homes.com/Redfin + Apple/Bing/Yelp/FB/LinkedIn/Nextdoor (all -> jessetek.net)
actions.why: Citations greenfield. 15+ consistent platforms ~= +23% pack likelihood. Don't trust old LOCAL-CITATIONS address.

actions.title: Earn 5 genuinely-local links: Downey + Montebello Chamber, Board of Realtors/NAHREP, partner vendor pages (lender/title/escrow/inspector)
actions.why: Real needle-mover behind the impression ceiling. Brain will draft outreach templates.

actions.title: FIX host mismatch: Vercel currently 307-redirects apex->www, but ALL canonicals/sitemap/OG/schema say non-www jessetek.net. Set jessetek.net as PRIMARY domain in Vercel (so www->apex 301). Then confirm sitemap in GSC + Bing + request indexing.
actions.why: DISCOVERED 2026-06-11 via curl: jessetek.net 307-redirects to www, contradicting every on-page canonical -> confuses host authority. Fix is a ~2-min Vercel Domains 'set primary' action; low risk since all on-page signals already point non-www. RE-CONFIRMED STILL LIVE 2026-06-11 run02 via curl (apex 307->www).

actions.title: Set up geo-grid rank tracking (Local Falcon/BrightLocal) centered on Downey; stop trusting GSC average position for local
actions.why: Map-pack rank varies block-by-block; GSC '3.9 on 7 impressions' is misleading for local. Closes the Brain's map-pack blind spot.

actions.title: Instagram->search flywheel: keyword phrases + geotags in reel captions; GBP review link + jessetek.net in bio; pinned 'review/book' highlight
actions.why: Reels drive branded search (a ranking signal, already ~2.5) and are Google-indexable since 2025-07-10.

actions.title: Fix 30 broken OG images on core-market city pages (Downey/Montebello/Pico Rivera/Norwalk/Whittier/Bellflower/Cerritos/Lakewood/La Mirada/Long Beach x3 templates) -> repoint og:image+twitter:image to valid og-home.jpg
actions.shipped: 2026-06-11 run02 commit 3eab696 — PUSHED to origin/main (e69abbf) from Mac via Finder-run script; Vercel auto-deployed; verified live (og-home.jpg serving on Downey/Montebello/Whittier pages, img 200).
actions.why: Broken social-share previews on his actual-market pages. Reversible. Proper per-city OGs later via og-gen.py on the Mac.

actions.title: Fix 28 broken #contact anchors site-wide: step-card links pointed to #contact with no matching target -> added id=contact to each page's booking cta-section (home/buyer/seller/es-index)
actions.shipped: 2026-06-28 run03 commit 559ef36 — PUSHED to origin/main from cloud sandbox (git creds worked this run); Vercel auto-build. Sourced from UX-AUDIT-2026-05-29.md High finding, re-verified live: 28 dead anchors (3+11+11+3), 0 existing id=contact; all now resolve to the 'Book a Strategy Call' card; pure id-only diff; 11/11 JSON-LD valid.
actions.why: Highest-intent UI element (How-It-Works cards -> booking) was a dead anchor on 4 money pages. Cheap CRO + crawl-hygiene win, reversible.

actions.title: Thursday competitor pack watch: Downey/Montebello bilingual incumbents
actions.why: Headline competitor Jesse Garcia (Realty World, DRE 01260007, bilingual, 25+yr, same Montebello 90640 ZIP) owns Montebello/East-LA but barely targets Downey + has a visible negative review. Gap = own Downey via Downey-named reviews + the new Downey page; press spotless 5.0. Needs Jesse's 5-min incognito-Maps verify for live counts.

actions.title: Auto-deploy of cloud-committed safe fixes — Mac launchd auto-push agent installed (net.jessetek.hourly-autopush)
actions.why: Built+installed net.jessetek.hourly-autopush (automation/scripts/run-hourly-autopush.sh + plist template; RunAtLoad+hourly; push-only, ahead-count guard). BLOCKED by macOS TCC: launchd agents can't touch the repo because it lives in ~/Documents (protected) -> first run returned 'Operation not permitted'. ONE manual step to activate hands-free deploy: System Settings > Privacy & Security > Full Disk Access > add /bin/bash (or move repo out of ~/Documents). ALT (Mac-independent, cleaner long-term): store a GitHub fine-grained PAT (contents:write) for the cloud task and push over HTTPS directly. Until then: cloud commits locally, Mac pushes via Finder-run script (proven 2026-06-11).

actions.title: Strip 12 fabricated Google-attributed Review nodes from reviews.html JSON-LD (each had publisher=Organization 'Google' + ratingValue 5 + first-name-initial authors / generic copy)
actions.shipped: 2026-06-28 run04 — S1 (the Jun-11 aggregateRating strip) only targeted aggregateRating and MISSED these per-Review nodes. Same FTC fake-review / Google manual-action liability: machine-readable claim that these hardcoded testimonials were published by Google. Surgical JSON-LD-only removal (206 deletions, 1 file); ZERO visible content changed (the 16 visible testimonial cards stay — they don't claim Google authorship); site-wide 380/380 JSON-LD blocks valid post-edit. Pushed to origin/main.
actions.why: Self-serving Review markup falsely attributed to Google = the exact compliance class S1 fixed. Self-hosted reviews about yourself are ineligible for review rich results since 2019 anyway, so zero ranking downside to removal.

actions.title: NAP-consistency: insights/feed.xml RSS managingEditor/webMaster still used the old jesse@jesseonate.com after the site-wide NAP email standardization to jesse@jessetek.net (commit 62e6676)
actions.shipped: 2026-06-29 run06 — repointed both RSS contact fields to canonical jesse@jessetek.net. Verified: 372 site-wide uses of jesse@jessetek.net vs only these 2 stragglers; 0 jesseonate.com refs remain in public/ after the edit; feed.xml still well-formed XML; 2-line diff, 1 file. The (562) 555-0123 / you@email.com hits in guide.html + buyer-quiz.html are intentional <input placeholder> UX hints (reserved fictional number), NOT NAP claims — left intact.
actions.why: Inconsistent contact email across owned properties dilutes the NAP/entity signal Google uses for local + branded. Jesse's own commit 62e6676 standardized email to jessetek.net; the RSS feed was the lone leftover. Low impact (RSS is a minor surface) but zero-risk and finishes the standardization Jesse started.

actions.title: Verify the 16 VISIBLE testimonial cards on reviews.html (+ buyer/seller/home cta-quotes) are REAL clients; activate the dormant #live-reviews Google-Places widget (currently display:none) so the page shows genuine Google reviews instead of/alongside hardcoded ones
actions.why: Discovered run04: reviews.html renders 12 hardcoded testimonials ('Maria G.', 'David R.', generic copy) as visible cards, AND has a live Google-Places review widget (reputationhub.site review-widget.js + #live-reviews data-source='google-places-api') sitting at display:none. Claude removed the fake Review *schema* (S3) but visible testimonial text is a content/authenticity call only Jesse can make: confirm these are real (keep) or replace with the live widget. Do NOT let Claude delete visible praise autonomously.

actions.title: Fix wrong-persona secondary CTA on seller.html (~line 554): 'Get the Free Buyer Guide' -> /guide on a SELLER page (copy-paste leftover from buyer.html). Repoint to /seller-net or /seller-checklist + matching copy
actions.why: High-confidence finding in UX-AUDIT-2026-05-29. Link resolves (not broken) so it's outside Claude's auto-deploy whitelist; changing visible marketing copy + choosing the offer is a CRO judgment call for Jesse. /seller-net and /seller-checklist both already exist.

actions.title: Add Reputation scope to the Jtek/GHL API key so the daily loop can read new Google reviews + draft replies
actions.why: Discovered run02: current key returns 401 'not authorized for this scope' on /reputation/reviews. Prerequisite for the daily review-reply automation (step 5).

What is STILL dark: the aggregate weekly-gsc-harvest task that writes gsc-harvest-*.json (source of goal.json baseline_kpis, the total-impressions reach metric) — newest still 2026-06-01, and weekly-rank-watch does not produce it. CAVEAT on the first reading: the 2026-07-13 pull returned 0 impr/null rank on ALL 10 queries incl. branded 'realtor jesse onate' (baseline ~2.5) => near-certainly a GSC ~2-3d finalization-lag empty-window artifact, not real zero visibility (see rank-snapshot.json). REMAINING owner=jesse action: restore the weekly-gsc-harvest scheduled task the same way weekly-rank-watch was restored, so aggregate reach KPIs refresh. Original root-cause below.
actions.why: ROOT-CAUSED run05 (3 prior runs only flagged it 'non-blocking' without diagnosing). GSC harvest stopped at gsc-harvest-2026-06-01.json. Cause = INCOMPLETE HOST MIGRATION: the last weekly-rank-watch log + every generated plist still embed the OLD Mac-mini path (/Users/jtek/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/.../JtekMac/.../landing-page). When the host moved to the MacBook Pro (/Users/jesseonate/Documents/Claude Code/Jessetek/landing-page), ONLY net.jessetek.seo-brain + net.jessetek.hourly-autopush were re-loaded. Confirmed ABSENT from `launchctl list`: weekly-rank-watch (the GSC harvester), daily-health-check, weekly-qc-sweep, weekly-clarity-review (+ all monthly/quarterly jobs). Result: SKILL 1 MEASURE has no fresh data, so every hourly run reports FLAT. FIX (1 idempotent command — re-derives PROJECT_ROOT for THIS laptop, migrates GSC creds, re-registers the job, smoke-tests): bash '/Users/jesseonate/Documents/Claude Code/Jessetek/landing-page/automation/scripts/apply-rank-watch-setup.sh' ; then force an immediate run: launchctl kickstart -k "gui/$(id -u)/net.jessetek.weekly-rank-watch". CAVEAT: that setup script's Step 2 references an install.sh not present in the repo this run — if it errors there, fall back to: copy automation/launchd/*.template, replace the jtek iCloud path with /Users/jesseonate/Documents/Claude Code/Jessetek/landing-page, write to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/, then `launchctl load -w` each. NOT auto-deployable (system/launchd + creds = outside the on-page SAFE-FIX whitelist), so it's correctly owner=jesse.

actions.title: Cut the autonomous loop's cost while the site is in verified-frozen + fully-jesse-blocked state: switch HOURLY_SEO_MODEL=sonnet in automation/config.local.sh, OR drop the launchd cadence from hourly to daily, until either GSC wakes (E5) or a public/ change lands
actions.why: SURFACED run22. The v9-v11 fast-path made each idle run cheap-in-tokens (one tally line) but the launchd job still FIRES HOURLY and burns one Opus invocation every time — 16 idle Opus runs on 2026-06-29 alone, every one blocked on an owner=jesse item (E5 harvester dark, J1/J2 GBP+reviews, J3/J4/J5 off-page). The site has been a verified-frozen clean tree (public/ == 09a40ce since run07) with zero autonomous on-page surface left until Jesse supplies real local content (C2/C3/C4/C6/C7) or unblocks the off-page levers. goal.json's own usage_budget note authorizes exactly this lever ('Cut cost anytime via HOURLY_SEO_MODEL=sonnet in automation/config.local.sh'). RECOMMENDATION: while frozen, either (a) one line in automation/config.local.sh: `export HOURLY_SEO_MODEL=sonnet` (keeps hourly liveness at ~1/5 the cost — a clean frozen tally needs no Opus reasoning), or (b) `launchctl` re-load net.jessetek.seo-brain at a daily cadence. Revert to hourly+Opus the moment E5 lands (fresh GSC data resumes MEASURE) or Jesse ships local content that reopens the on-page backlog. Surfaced once here; future frozen runs just tick the tally and won't re-raise this.
